$schema: 25 Q&A entries to seed on both GBP locations. Q is asked from a personal Google account, A is answered from the business Manager account. Pre-staged copy from GBP-OPTIMIZATION-CHECKLIST.md §5.

qa.question: How much does it cost for a property to use Axle Towing's parking enforcement?
qa.answer: Our parking enforcement program is completely free for property owners. We handle signage, patrols, and towing at zero cost to you — tow fees from violators cover our service. Call 480-288-5526 for a free property assessment.

qa.question: What areas does Axle Towing serve?
qa.answer: We serve the entire Phoenix metropolitan area including Phoenix, Scottsdale, Mesa, Tempe, Chandler, Gilbert, Glendale, Apache Junction, and 30+ surrounding communities. Our two locations in Apache Junction and Phoenix allow us to respond quickly across the entire Valley.

qa.question: How quickly can Axle Towing respond to a tow request?
qa.answer: Our average response time is 30 minutes or less, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. We dispatch from two locations to cover the entire metro area with faster response times than a single-location competitor.

qa.question: Do you provide towing signage for our property?
qa.answer: Yes! We provide and install Arizona-compliant towing signage at every entrance to your property at no cost. Our signs meet all ARS 9-499.05 and HB 2269 requirements, protecting you from liability. We also offer free signage audits for existing properties.

qa.question: How do I find out if my car was towed by Axle Towing?
qa.answer: Visit axletowing.com/locate-vehicle to search for your vehicle online 24/7, or call us directly at 480-288-5526. We can confirm if we have your vehicle and walk you through the retrieval process.

qa.question: What types of properties does Axle Towing work with?
qa.answer: We work with apartment complexes, HOA communities, commercial properties, retail centers, office buildings, medical facilities, churches, and industrial parks. Any private property with parking that needs professional enforcement — we can help.

qa.question: Is Axle Towing licensed and insured?
qa.answer: Yes, we are fully licensed, insured, and bonded in the state of Arizona. We are also a proud member of the Arizona Multihousing Association (AMA). Our team has 30+ years of combined experience in the towing and enforcement industry.

qa.question: Do you offer parking enforcement for HOA communities?
qa.answer: Absolutely. We have a dedicated HOA towing program with customized enforcement rules for each community. We provide monthly reports for board meetings, handle all signage compliance, and offer 24/7 response for emergency tow situations. Visit axletowing.com/services/hoa-towing.

qa.question: What happens to a vehicle after it's towed?
qa.answer: Towed vehicles are stored securely at one of our two facilities. The vehicle owner is notified per Arizona law, and they can retrieve their vehicle with valid ID, vehicle registration, and payment of applicable fees. Full details at axletowing.com/locate-vehicle.

qa.question: Do you speak Spanish?
qa.answer: ¡Sí! Ofrecemos servicio en español. Visite axletowing.com/es para información en español, o llámenos al 480-288-5526. Estamos aquí para ayudarle.

qa.question: What is private property towing in Arizona?
qa.answer: Private property towing (also called consent towing) is when a towing company removes vehicles from private property at the request of the property owner or authorized agent. In Arizona, it is governed by ARS 9-499.05 and requires specific signage at all entrances. Axle Towing handles this for properties across the Phoenix metro area.

qa.question: How do I set up a parking enforcement program for my apartment complex?
qa.answer: It's simple — call 480-288-5526 or visit axletowing.com/get-quote for a free property assessment. We'll evaluate your parking situation, recommend a customized enforcement plan, install compliant signage, and begin patrols on a schedule that works for your property.

qa.question: Can you tow vehicles from a fire lane or handicapped space?
qa.answer: Yes. Fire lane violations and unauthorized use of handicapped spaces are among the most common reasons property owners call us. These tows can happen immediately without waiting, and we respond 24/7 to these high-priority situations.

qa.question: What is the best towing company for HOA parking enforcement in Phoenix?
qa.answer: Axle Towing & Impound specializes in HOA parking enforcement across Phoenix and the East Valley. We offer zero cost to the HOA, customized enforcement rules per your CC&Rs, monthly compliance reports for board meetings, and 24/7 dispatch. Call 480-288-5526.

qa.question: Do you provide monthly reports for property managers?
qa.answer: Yes. Every property we serve receives a monthly enforcement report showing tow counts by violation type, patrol frequency, and any compliance issues noted. These reports help property managers and HOA boards track activity and demonstrate enforcement to residents.

qa.question: Can I get towing service near Apache Junction?
qa.answer: Axle Towing & Impound has a location at 1151 W. Apache Trail, Apache Junction, AZ 85120. We serve Apache Junction, Gold Canyon, Mesa, Gilbert, and all East Valley communities. Call 480-288-5526 for immediate dispatch.

qa.question: What are the Arizona towing sign requirements for private property?
qa.answer: Under ARS 9-499.05, every entrance to a privately-owned parking area must have signage that includes: the towing company name, phone number, address, and hours of enforcement. Signs must be visible and legible. Axle Towing installs compliant signs at no charge as part of our enforcement program.

qa.question: How do I report an abandoned vehicle in a parking lot?
qa.answer: If you manage the property or are authorized by the owner, call us at 480-288-5526 and we can dispatch a driver. If it is your personal vehicle situation, we can help identify the right process. We serve all of Phoenix, Apache Junction, and the surrounding metro area.

qa.question: What is the difference between a private property tow and a repossession?
qa.answer: A private property tow (consent tow) is when a property owner removes an unauthorized vehicle from their premises — the tow company works for the property. A repossession is when a lender reclaims a vehicle due to missed loan payments — the tow company works for the creditor. Axle Towing handles private property tows only, not repossessions.

qa.question: Does Axle Towing handle commercial properties like strip malls and shopping centers?
qa.answer: Yes. We work with retail centers, strip malls, shopping centers, office parks, and industrial properties across the Phoenix metro area. Our program protects customer and tenant parking and removes non-customer vehicles at no cost to the property owner.

qa.question: How do I start a towing contract for my apartment complex?
qa.answer: Call 480-288-5526 or request a free assessment at axletowing.com/get-quote. We'll review your parking rules, existing signage, and enforcement history — then propose a customized program. Most properties can be up and running within 48 hours.

qa.question: What should an HOA board know before hiring a towing company?
qa.answer: Key questions to ask: Are they Arizona-licensed and insured? Do they provide compliant signage? Will they give monthly enforcement reports? What is their response time? Do they handle the MVD notification process after a tow? Axle Towing handles all of these — call 480-288-5526 to learn more.

qa.question: Is parking enforcement free for property owners in Arizona?
qa.answer: Yes, with a consent towing company like Axle Towing. The property owner or HOA pays nothing — the vehicle owner pays the tow and storage fees. This is how private property towing works under Arizona law when the property has proper signage in place.

qa.question: Do you tow vehicles for church parking lots?
qa.answer: Yes. We work with churches, religious institutions, and faith communities across the Phoenix area to manage parking during services and events. We are sensitive to the unique enforcement needs of religious organizations and can customize patrol schedules around service times.

qa.question: What towing company is open 24 hours in Phoenix?
qa.answer: Axle Towing & Impound is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. We dispatch from two locations — Apache Junction and Phoenix — to serve the entire metro area. Call 480-288-5526 any time for immediate dispatch.
